titleStmt.title: SII 17.211: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 211. (A.R. No. 189 of 1904.) TIRUVAKKARAI, VILUPPURAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west and south bases of the maṇḍapa inside the first prākāra of Chandramauḷīśvara temple.
The details of date given, viz., Śaka 1437, Bhāva, Āḍi 9, correspond to 1515 A.D. July 8. The Śaka year quoted was current.

This inscription records the grant of 2 pieces of land to a Śaiva-maṭha presided over by Tiruvakkarai Tirukkāḷatti Pichchan MeññAṉa(MeyjñAṉa)-māmuṉi for māhēśvarapUjā, by Tirumalai NAyaka,Compare A.R. Ep., 1924, No. 145.and the śrIbhaṇḍArattār of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śuvasti . śrīmaṉ śrīvīrakiṣṇayirāyarkku cellāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 3 10eṉ mel pāvavaruṣam Āṭimātam 9�śrīmatu tirumalai
nāyakkarum tiruvakkarai Uṭaiya nayiṉār [śrīpa]ṇṭārattārum cilālekai paṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭi tiruvakkarai tirukkāḷattipiccan
meññāṉa māmuṉiyaḷ peril caivamaṭattukku māyeśvarapūcaikkup putuppākkam Eri kiḻ kaṭṭukkaraikku teṟku pirāyam paḷḷa Uṭaippukku kiḻakku
vaṭakku Ural piḷikaikku meṟku Itukku Uḷpaṭṭa kuṇṭil 2 10 7� 2 10 4 Aṭikkolāl nañcey kuḻi1 kuḻi=27'X24'. 5 100 koraikeṇiyil
piṟivāṉa kāṅkayaṉentalil vaṭamelai mūlaiyil Ayyanār koyil tākkil 2 10 4 Aṭiyil kuḻi5 100 Āka kuḻi 1000 Inta
kuḻi Āyiramum Intac caiva maṭattukkuc cantiṟātitta varaiyum caṟuvamāṉṉiyamāka naṭakkakkaṭa vatākavum Itukku
Akitam paṇṇiṉavanThe Imprecatory portion of this inscription is lost.
Digital edition of SII 17.211 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
